overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game (resembling Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in western attire walking along a rugged coastal shoreline. The character explores a rocky beach environment during golden hour, wading through shallow tide pools and navigating around large rock formations as waves wash up along the shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal beach with large boulder formations

events.description: character steps from dry sand into shallow tide pool water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy beach toward the water's edge, approaching large rock formations

entered.detail: large weathered boulder formation with patches of vegetation on top
steep rocky cliff face covered with sparse greenery rising above the beach
calm turquoise coastal water meeting the shoreline
tan colored sand with scattered small rocks and debris

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rugged coastal beach during golden hour, with a character walking toward the water's edge. A massive rock outcrop dominates the right side of the frame while a steep cliff rises in the distance on the left. The character moves from dry sand into shallow water as they explore the shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow tide pools between rocky outcrops

events.description: passes the large rock formation, moving into more open tide pool area
navigates around submerged rocks while wading through shallow water

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow tide pools and navigating between submerged rocks along the coast

entered.detail: shallow clear water pools between rocks with visible underwater terrain
partially submerged boulders creating obstacles in the water
isolated sea stack rock formation visible on the horizon
scattered branches and wooden debris washed up on the beach

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the coastal environment, wading through shallow tide pools after passing the large rock formation. The terrain becomes more rugged with submerged rocks and scattered driftwood. A distant sea stack becomes visible on the horizon as the character navigates the rocky shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: open shoreline with surf and waves

events.description: waves begin washing up around the character's feet as the tide comes in
sun breaks through clouds creating brighter reflections on the water surface

agents.ego_description: walking along the water's edge where waves wash up on the wet sand, moving toward more open beach

entered.detail: gentle ocean waves breaking and washing up on the shoreline

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along a more open shoreline where gentle waves wash up on the wet sand. The coastal cliff looms closer on the left while the ocean surf becomes more prominent. The lighting shifts as the sun breaks through the clouds, creating sparkling reflections on the water as the character continues their coastal exploration.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rugged coastline that transitions from a sheltered rocky beach into an open, sun-drenched shoreline. It begins with a character walking from dry sand toward the water's edge, flanked by a massive rock outcrop on the right and a steep cliff in the distance. As the character passes the rock formation, the scene shifts into a more rugged terrain of shallow tide pools, submerged rocks, and scattered driftwood, revealing a distant sea stack on the horizon. The environment then opens up into a wide stretch of wet sand where gentle waves wash ashore and the coastal cliff looms closer on the left. Finally, the lighting transforms as the sun breaks through the clouds, casting sparkling reflections across the ocean surf as the character continues their exploration.
